pr.title: chore(review): automated dependency review for spegel 0.6.0 → 0.7.1 (PR #205)
pr.body:
Automated Renovate review for the spegel Helm chart minor bump (`0.6.0 → 0.7.1`) targeting the bootstrap helmfile.

## What was assessed

- **Scope**: Single-line change in `bootstrap/helmfile.d/01-apps.yaml` — bootstrap path only; the Flux GitOps path (`ocirepository.yaml`) already pins `0.7.1` with a digest, so the workload is likely already reconciled
- **v0.7.0 notable changes**: new default hostPath persistence (`/var/lib/spegel`), QUIC in P2P router, peer metadata protocol change (rolling upgrade caveat), Containerd 1.7/2.0 support dropped (≥2.1 required)
- **v0.7.1**: data race fix in blob request handling

## Verdict

**Yellow — Caution / Merge after checks**

Existing HelmRelease values are compatible (explicit `containerdRegistryConfigPath` override survives the upstream default change). Main pre-merge gates: confirm Spegel pods are healthy at 0.7.1 on-cluster, verify node Containerd version ≥ 2.1, and confirm `/var/lib/spegel` hostPath is provisioning cleanly.

Full findings in `.copilot-review/result.md`.
pr.author: Copilot
